statement: The CISA/NCSC 'Guidelines for Secure AI System Development' were published 26 November 2023 with 21+ international partners (including ASD ACSC), establishing secure-by-design across the AI lifecycle.

evidence.quote: On 26 November 2023, the US CISA, together with the UK's NCSC, published joint 'Guidelines for Secure AI System Development' ... in cooperation with 21 other agencies

falsifier: NCSC/CISA pages dating the guidelines other than November 2023 would falsify this.
